description: Fix the server.logs.length = 0 race condition that causes spurious E2E test timeouts. The pattern `server.logs.length = 0; triggerHotReload(); waitForLog(server, 'X')` is racy: if the server already emitted message 'X' before the clear (due to async timing), the clear destroys the evidence and waitForLog then times out waiting for a second occurrence that may never arrive. Replace every instance with a count-snapshot approach: capture the count of existing 'X' occurrences before the action, trigger the action, then poll until the count increases.

userStories.title: Fix server.logs race in side-panel-realtime-state.e2e.ts and side-panel-instant-startup.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Replace all `server.logs.length = 0` occurrences with the count-snapshot pattern to eliminate spurious waitForLog timeouts.
acceptanceCriteria: No `server.logs.length = 0` remains in side-panel-realtime-state.e2e.ts or side-panel-instant-startup.e2e.ts

Each former clear site uses a pattern like: `const countBefore = server.logs.filter(l => l.includes(TARGET)).length; triggerAction(); await waitFor(() => server.logs.filter(l => l.includes(TARGET)).length > countBefore, timeout, 200, label)`
The existing `waitFor` helper from e2e/helpers.ts is used (not a new helper)

userStories.title: Fix server.logs race in plugin-review.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Replace all four `mcpServer.logs.length = 0` occurrences in plugin-review.e2e.ts with the count-snapshot approach.
acceptanceCriteria: Each former clear site uses the count-snapshot pattern with waitFor

userStories.title: Fix server.logs race in adapter-files-eager.e2e.ts and adapter-hash.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Replace all server.logs.length = 0 occurrences in adapter-files-eager.e2e.ts (3 occurrences) and adapter-hash.e2e.ts (4 occurrences). For adapter-hash.e2e.ts, also ensure sequential hot reload waiting in the loop.
acceptanceCriteria: No `server.logs.length = 0` or `mcpServer.logs.length = 0` remains in either file
All 3 occurrences in adapter-files-eager.e2e.ts and all 4 in adapter-hash.e2e.ts use count-snapshot pattern
The hot reload loop in adapter-hash.e2e.ts correctly waits for each reload to complete before triggering the next

userStories.title: Fix server.logs race in multi-profile-diagnostics.e2e.ts and stress-config-reload Promise.all race
userStories.description: Replace server.logs.length = 0 in multi-profile-diagnostics.e2e.ts (2 occurrences) and fix the concurrent config-write + POST-reload race in stress-config-reload.e2e.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: In stress-config-reload.e2e.ts, the config write completes before POST /reload is sent (sequential, not concurrent via Promise.all)
